transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Did you reserve a computer for tomorrow's design project?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. I booked one this morning because the lab gets crowded in the afternoon.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the woman reserve the computer this morning?

questions.prompt: Why did the woman reserve the computer this morning?

choices.text: She wanted to avoid the afternoon crowds.
The lab opens only in the morning.

questions.explanation: She explains that the computer lab gets crowded in the afternoon.
questions.evidence: The lab gets crowded in the afternoon.
